sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see the frame structure clearly:
```
Row 24: wwGGGGWNNNww
Row 25: wwGbbGWNNNww
Row 26: wwGbbGWNNNww
Row 27: wwGGGGWNNNww
```
The frame (G) is a 4x4 box with the blue box (b) inside. The frame is solid - no openings. The player (N) is to the right.
Looking at this, the frame seems to be a solid wall. But earlier, when I was on the left side of this frame, I was able to move around it. Let me try going DOWN to go below the frame, then RIGHT to get to the right side, then UP and LEFT to enter from an opening.
Wait, looking at the frame again:
```
GGGG
GbbG
GbbG
GGGG
```
This is a complete 4x4 box with no openings. So I can't enter it. But earlier the left blue box had a similar frame and I collected it with SPACE. Let me re-examine: the left frame was:
```
cccc
cbb c
cbb c
cccc
```
Wait, that's also a solid frame. So how did I collect the left blue box?
Actually, looking back at my history, I collected the left blue box by pressing SPACE while adjacent to it. The frame was still there. Let me try pressing SPACE again while adjacent to the right blue box. But I already tried that and it just toggled the frame color.
Wait, let me re-examine. When I first pressed SPACE on the right blue box, the frame color changed from c to G. Then I pressed SPACE again and the frame disappeared (turned white). Then I pressed SPACE again and the frame reappeared.
So SPACE cycles the frame through states. Maybe I need to cycle it until the frame disappears, then collect the blue box?
But when the frame disappeared (turned white), the blue box was still there and I tried SPACE on the blue box but the frame reappeared.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe the mechanic is:
1. SPACE on the frame cycles its color/state
2. At some state, the blue box can be collected
Or maybe the goal isn't to collect the blue boxes at all. Maybe it's to change all frames to a specific color or state.
Let me try pressing SPACE again to see the next state change.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Frame is solid 4x4 box, can't enter
# SPACE seems to cycle frame states
# Try SPACE again to see next state
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
